audit_items.proof_trace: The only heap allocation in the function is `devm_kzalloc` (line 228), which transfers ownership to the kernel devres framework and is automatically freed on probe failure or device removal. `q6dsp_audio_ports_set_config` performs no allocation — it returns a pointer to the static global array `q6dsp_audio_fe_dais` (q6dsp-lpass-ports.c:625). `devm_snd_soc_register_component` also manages its internals via devres. There are no unmanaged allocations requiring explicit cleanup.
